messages.content: 将两句合成一句话：In future operations, the HIAF is anticipated to fulfil experimental requirements involving up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse and will accommodate multiple experimental terminals for an extensive array of particle and nuclear physics investigations. Given such significant beam densities and the diversity of experimental requirements, the implementation of an easily integrable, scalable, high-bandwidth, generic Data AcQuisition (DAQ) system is of pivotal importance.

In anticipation of fulfilling experimental requirements involving up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse and accommodating multiple experimental terminals for an extensive array of particle and nuclear physics investigations in future operations, the significance of implementing an easily integrable, scalable, high-bandwidth, generic Data Acquisition (DAQ) system is amplified due to the significant beam densities and diverse experimental requirements faced by the HIAF.
再精简一下

To meet future operational needs, including handling up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse and supporting a wide range of particle and nuclear physics experiments, the HIAF must implement a scalable, high-bandwidth, generic DAQ system, crucial due to the significant beam densities and diverse experimental requirements.
再精简

For future HIAF operations requiring up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse and diverse physics experiments, a scalable, high-bandwidth DAQ system is crucial to handle significant beam densities and varied experimental needs.
再精简
The HIAF needs a scalable, high-bandwidth DAQ system for its future operations with diverse experiments and up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse.

总结为两点：- 通用性：如何确保数据采集卡可用于不同的物理实验。
- 高性能：速度、精度和稳定性指标要求。
- 可拓展性：未来升级与改进的可能性。

确保数据采集系统（DAQ）的高效运作在高能物理实验中至关重要，特别是在高强度加速器设施如HIAF的未来运营中。以下是三个关键方面的总结：

1. **通用性**：为了确保数据采集系统可以适应不同的物理实验需求，设计时需采用模块化和标准化的接口和协议。这样可以保证系统与各种传感器和实验装置兼容，同时也便于在不同实验间共享和迁移设备。

2. **高性能**：高速、精确和稳定是数据采集系统性能的关键指标。这要求系统具备高速的数据处理和传输能力，以应对每脉冲高达1 × 10^11离子的挑战。同时，系统必须提供足够的精度，以确保实验数据的质量，并且稳定性要足以支撑长时间的连续运行，保证实验的可靠性。

3. **可扩展性**：随着实验需求的发展和技术的进步，数据采集系统可能需要升级或改进。设计时考虑到系统的可扩展性，可以通过增加处理能力、扩展存储容量或升级软件等方式，来应对未来的需求变化，从而保证了系统的长期有效性和经济性。

综上所述，通用性、高性能和可扩展性是设计和实施数据采集系统时必须重视的三个关键方面，特别是面对HIAF这样的高技术要求场合。
润色：Versatility: In order to ensure that the data acquisition system can adapt to different physical experiment needs, modular and standardized interfaces and protocols need to be used in the design.
多功能性：为确保数据采集系统能够适应各种物理实验需求，其设计中需采纳模块化和标准化的接口与协议。这种做法保障了系统能与多种传感器及实验装置兼容，并便于设备在不同实验之间的共享与迁移。

英文润色：Universality: In order to ensure that the data acquisition system can be adapted to the needs of different physical experiments, the design needs to use modular and standardised interfaces and protocols.

Universality: To guarantee the data acquisition system's adaptability to the diverse requirements of physical experiments, it is essential to incorporate modular and standardized interfaces and protocols in the design.
精简语言，列出要点即可
Universality: Ensure adaptability through modular, standardized interfaces and protocols.
精简：高性能：高速、精确和稳定是数据采集系统性能的关键指标。这要求系统具备高速的数据处理和传输能力，以应对每脉冲高达1 × 10^11离子的挑战。同时，系统必须提供足够的精度，以确保实验数据的质量，并且稳定性要足以支撑长时间的连续运行，保证实验的可靠性。
High Performance: Essential for handling up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse, necessitating rapid data processing, precise accuracy, and dependable stability for quality results and consistent operation.
再精简
High Performance: Requires fast processing, high accuracy, and stability to manage up to 1 × 10^11 ions per pulse and ensure reliable, quality experiments.
可扩展性：随着实验需求的发展和技术的进步，数据采集系统可能需要升级或改进。
Scalability: Upgrades or improvements may be needed as experimental demands and technology evolve.

总结为一句话，不超过15字：Anchored by the new generation of the Common Data Acquisition Unit (new CDAU) board shown in Fig. 1, this system is capable of supporting data transmission bandwidths of up to 40 Gbps, and is characterized by its exceptional scalability and ease of integration. Embracing a standardized design methodology, the system substantially streamlines the development process, reduces design costs, and eases the maintenance of DAQ systems for experimental terminals conducted at HIAF.
The new CDAU board offers up to 40 Gbps, scalability, and easy integration.
20个字
New CDAU board supports 40 Gbps, boasts scalability, easy integration, and streamlines DAQ system development.
请体现出HIAF
New CDAU board enhances HIAF with 40 Gbps support, scalability, easy integration, and streamlined DAQ development.
New CDAU board revolutionizes HIAF, offering 40 Gbps support, unmatched scalability, easy integration, and streamlined development for DAQ systems.
不够好，基于new cdau的来设计高性能扩展的DAQ系统
Designing a high-performance, scalable DAQ system based on the new CDAU board enhances HIAF with 40 Gbps support and streamlined integration.

总结为一句话，不超过30字：Anchored by the new generation of the Common Data Acquisition Unit (new CDAU) board shown in Fig. 1, this system is capable of supporting data transmission bandwidths of up to 40 Gbps, and is characterized by its exceptional scalability and ease of integration. Embracing a standardized design methodology, the system substantially streamlines the development process, reduces design costs, and eases the maintenance of DAQ systems for experimental terminals conducted at HIAF.
Leveraging the new CDAU board, this system boosts HIAF with 40 Gbps data bandwidth, scalability, easy integration, and optimizes DAQ development and maintenance.
不是增加HIAF，是提升HIAF的数据采集能力
The new CDAU board elevates HIAF's data acquisition capabilities with 40 Gbps bandwidth, exceptional scalability, and simplified integration and maintenance.
New CDAU boosts HIAF's DAQ with 40 Gbps, scalability, and ease.
New CDAU board elevates HIAF's data collection: 40 Gbps, superior scalability, and effortless integration.
基于CDAU的数据获取系统提升HIAF的数据获取能力
CDAU-based system enhances HIAF's data acquisition capabilities.
基于可扩展易集成的CDAU的数据获取系统将提升HIAF的数据获取能力
A scalable, easily integrated CDAU-based system will boost HIAF's data acquisition capacity.
基于可扩展易集成的CDAU板的数据获取系统将提升HIAF的数据获取能力
A data acquisition system based on the scalable, easily integrated CDAU board will enhance HIAF's data collection capabilities.
精简：The High Intensity Heavy Ion Accelerator Facility (HIAF) in China, slated for completion in 2025, will provide critical support for these cutting-edge inquiries
Set for 2025 completion, China's HIAF will be pivotal for cutting-edge research.
数据获取系统有CDAU板和DAQ软件组成。
The data acquisition system comprises CDAU boards and DAQ software.
在CDAU板上实现高带宽的光纤通路和PCIe接口
High-bandwidth optical paths and PCIe interfaces are implemented on the CDAU board.
数据获取软件利用多线程设计，可实时处理数据并可视化。
The data acquisition software uses a multi-threaded design for real-time data processing and visualization.
光纤接口48小时表征结果显示稳定在10Gbps速率，误码率低至10E-16
The optical interface characterization results show stability at 10Gbps with a low bit error rate of 10E-16 over 48 hours.
PCIe接口经过48小数测试，其写速率稳定在3420MB/s，读速率稳定在3394MB/s.
After 48 hours of testing, the PCIe interface maintained stable write speeds of 3420MB/s and read speeds of 3394MB/s.
使用同一个探测器同时测量了宇宙能谱
The cosmic energy spectrum was measured simultaneously using the same detector.
用于HIAF的基于CDAU板的数据获取已经被设计和开发。
A data acquisition system based on the CDAU board has been designed and developed for HIAF.
具有较好的扩展性和易集成性，可根据不同实验需求进行集成。
It features good scalability and ease of integration, allowing for customization based on varying experimental needs.
系统测试表明系统能够承担高带宽、高数据率的数据传输。
System tests indicate it can handle high-bandwidth, high-data-rate transmissions.
